name: Graduation Berry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/3 cup SUGAR, 1/2 pound CREAM CHEESE, 1 cup YOGURT (PLAIN), and 4 ICE CUBES in a blender.
2. Add egg yolks, lemon juice, and lemon rind to the blender and blend until smooth.
3. Mix in half of the sliced STRAWBERRIES (HULLED).
4. Press the GRANOLA mixture into a 9-inch pie dish and set aside.
5. Pour the berry mixture over the crust and top with the remaining whole berries.
6. Chill until serving.
The fresh strawberries from summer are ideal for this pie, but any seasonal berry can be substituted to make graduation a grand celebration.
